tuning: E A D G B E
content:
THE PAINTER
As recorded by Cody Johnson
(2023 release)


[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
She talks about the future like she's flippin' through a magazine[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Finds the beauty in the thrown away and broken things[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Gets excited about all my crazy dreams[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Got every sunset that she's ever seen memorized[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Saves them away for a rainy day or stormy night[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
The sky's brighter lookin' at it through her eyes[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I don't remember[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Life before she came into the picture[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
Brought the beauty I was missin' with her[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Showed me colors I ain't ever seen[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
She took chances[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
With every wall I built, she saw a canvas[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
I thank God every day for how He made her[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
My life was black and white but she is the painter[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
She reminds me that it ain't too late to start again[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Fine is good but you need some blue every now and then[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
How'd I live so long without her reckless touch?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I don't remember[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Life before she came into the picture[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
Brought the beauty I was missin' with her[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Showed me colors I ain't ever seen[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
She took chances[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
With every wall I built, she saw a canvas[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
I thank God every day for how He made her[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
My life was black and white but she is the painter[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I don't remember[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Life before she came into the picture[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
Brought the beauty I was missin' with her[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Showed me colors I ain't ever seen[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
She took chances[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
With every wall I built, she saw a canvas[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
I thank God every day for how He made her[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
My life was black and white but she is the painter[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
She is the painter[/tab]
